def solve(nums, k)
  return 0 if nums.length == 1
  sorted_nums = nums.sort
  max_len = 1
  nums.length.times do |left|
    target = sorted_nums[left] * k
    low = left
    high = sorted_nums.length - 1
    right = left
    while low <= high
      mid = (low + high) / 2.0.to_i
      if sorted_nums[mid] <= target
        right = mid
        low = mid + 1
      else
        high = mid - 1
      end
    end
    current_len = right - left + 1
    max_len = current_len if current_len > max_len
  end
  nums.length - max_len
end
